Numbered Paper

Body
A study cites numbered references [1].

References
[1] Smith, J. (2023). Numbered AI reference. Journal One. doi:10.1111/numbered.2023
[2] Johnson, A. (2021). Wrapped reference title
continues on the next line. Journal Two. https://doi.org/10.2222/wrapped.2021.
3. Broken, B. (2020). Broken DOI example. doi: 10.abc/bad
